summary: Comprehensive testing of TrustOffice Compensation module refactoring complete. All 12 features verified: backend API endpoints and frontend UI elements all working correctly. Primary plan per trust per year model fully functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/compensation-ytd returns year, ytd_total, annual_approved, exceeds_plan, remaining, primary_plan
GET /api/compensation-plans/primary returns primary plan for year
POST /api/compensation-plans creates plan with is_primary and year fields
Compensation page shows YTD total with 'Within Plan' badge
Compensation Plan card shows annual approved amount ($5,000.00) with edit button
Plan card has helper text: 'This is the total annual compensation envelope for this trust. Individual payments are tracked against this amount.'
Advanced Plans section is collapsible and shows trustee-specific plans (5 plans found)
Advanced section has helper text: 'Optional: Set separate compensation caps for individual trustees or roles.'
Can create new trustee-specific plan with 'Add Trustee-Specific Plan' button
Trustee-specific plan modal has 'Trustee / Role Name *' field (required)
Record Payment modal shows warning when payment would exceed plan ('This payment will exceed the annual plan')
Edit plan modal shows 'Set the total annual compensation envelope for this trust'
critical_code_review_comments: Backend compensation.py properly implements primary plan determination via get_primary_plan_for_year helper
Plan creation auto-determines is_primary based on trustee_name presence and existing plans
YTD endpoint returns comprehensive data including primary_plan object
Frontend CompensationPage.js correctly handles both primary and trustee-specific plans
data-testid attributes present on key elements: plan-modal, payment-modal, plan-amount, plan-trustee-name
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data with 1 primary plan ($5,000), 5 trustee-specific plans, and 5 payments
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compensation module refactoring fully verified. Primary plan model working with one primary plan per trust per year. Frontend shows YTD tracking with 'Within Plan'/'Exceeds Plan' badges, collapsible Advanced section for trustee-specific plans, and payment modal warns when exceeding plan. Backend endpoints: /api/compensation-ytd, /api/compensation-plans/primary, /api/compensation-plans (POST with is_primary, year fields).

create_plan_with_is_primary.auto_primary_determination: Yes - defaults to primary if no trustee_name and no existing primary

frontend_ytd_card.shows: YTD total, Annual Approved Envelope, Remaining, Progress bar
frontend_ytd_card.badge: 'Within Plan' or 'Exceeds Plan' based on ytd vs approved

frontend_plan_card.helper_text: This is the total annual compensation envelope for this trust.

frontend_advanced_section.label: TRUSTEE-SPECIFIC PLANS (ADVANCED)
frontend_advanced_section.helper_text: Optional: Set separate compensation caps for individual trustees or roles.

frontend_trustee_plan_modal.title: Add Trustee-Specific Plan
frontend_trustee_plan_modal.description: Set a compensation cap for a specific trustee or role.
frontend_trustee_plan_modal.helper_text: Identify which trustee or role this cap applies to

frontend_payment_warning.trigger: When payment amount + YTD would exceed annual_approved
frontend_payment_warning.warning_text: This payment will exceed the annual plan
